description: A video resource represents a YouTube video.

kind.description: Identifies the API resource's type. Value is youtube#video.

id.description: The ID that YouTube uses to uniquely identify the video.

snippet.description: Basic details about a video, including its title, description, tags, and category.

publishedAt.description: The date and time when the video was published.

channelId.description: The ID of the YouTube channel that published the video.

description.example: A sample description for this resource.

thumbnails.description: A map of thumbnail images associated with the video.

channelTitle.description: The channel title of the YouTube channel that published the video.

tags.description: A list of keyword tags associated with the video.

categoryId.description: The YouTube video category associated with the video.

liveBroadcastContent.description: Indicates if the video is an upcoming/active live broadcast.

defaultLanguage.description: The language of the text in the video resource's snippet.title and snippet.description properties.

localized.description: The snippet.localized object contains either a localized title and description for the video or the title in the default language.

contentDetails.description: Information about the video content, including the length of the video and an indication of whether captions are available.

duration.description: The length of the video in ISO 8601 format.

dimension.description: Indicates whether the video is available in 3D or in 2D.

definition.description: Indicates whether the video is available in high definition or standard definition.

caption.description: Indicates whether captions are available for the video.

licensedContent.description: Indicates whether the video represents licensed content, which means that the content has been claimed by a YouTube content partner.

contentRating.description: Specifies the ratings that the video received under various rating schemes.

status.description: The status of an uploaded video.

uploadStatus.description: The status of the uploaded video.

embeddable.description: Indicates whether the video can be embedded on another website.

publicStatsViewable.description: Indicates whether the video's extended statistics on the video's watch page are publicly viewable.

madeForKids.description: Indicates whether the video is designated as child-directed.

statistics.description: Statistics about the video such as the number of times the video has been viewed or liked.

viewCount.description: The number of times the video has been viewed.

likeCount.description: The number of users who have indicated that they liked the video.

dislikeCount.description: The number of users who have indicated that they disliked the video.

favoriteCount.description: The number of users who have added the video to their favorites list.

commentCount.description: The number of comments for the video.

player.description: Information used to play the video.

embedHtml.description: An iframe tag that embeds a player that will play the video.

embedHeight.description: The height of the embedded player returned in the player.embedHtml property.

embedWidth.description: The width of the embedded player returned in the player.embedHtml property.

localizations.description: The localizations object contains translations of the video's metadata.

title: Video
